title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: konenMCBB college basketball data package R. brings together data three primary sources: Bart Torvik (barttorvik.com) — industry-standard adjusted efficiency ratings, four factors, shooting splits, schedule data D1 men’s basketball ESPN (site.api.espn.com) — live historical game data including box scores, play--play, win probability, betting lines, /rotations, local file database offline season-wide analysis Legacy sources — Sports Reference game logs rosters, NCAA.com PBP, Covers.com injury reports vignette walks main workflows installation full cross-source analysis.

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Install from GitHub (requires devtools or pak) devtools::install_github("charliekonen/konenMCBB")  # Or with pak pak::pak("charliekonen/konenMCBB")

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: Torvik family functions always take year argument — ending year season (2025 means 2024-25 season).

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: adj_oe points per 100 possessions offense (adjusted schedule), adj_de points allowed per 100 possessions, barthag power rating — probability beating average D1 team neutral floor.
code: library(konenMCBB) library(dplyr)  # Current season ratings for all teams ratings <- torvik_team_ratings(year = 2025)  # Top 25 by T-Rank power rating (Barthag) ratings |>   slice_max(barthag, n = 25) |>   select(rank, team, conf, adj_oe, adj_de, barthag, wab)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Four factors: eFG%, TO rate, reb%, FT rate — both ends of the floor ff <- torvik_four_factors(year = 2025)  # Best defenses by defensive eFG% allowed ff |>   arrange(d_efg) |>   select(team, conf, d_efg, d_to_pct, d_reb_pct, d_ftr) |>   head(20)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Shot location breakdowns: rim, mid-range, 3PT — offense and defense shooting <- torvik_shooting(year = 2025)  # Teams that live at the rim and avoid mid-rangers shooting |>   filter(o_rim_rate > 0.40, o_mid_rate < 0.18) |>   arrange(desc(o_rim_pct)) |>   select(team, conf, o_rim_rate, o_rim_pct, o_mid_rate, o_three_rate)  # Best rim-protecting defenses shooting |>   arrange(d_rim_pct) |>   select(team, conf, d_rim_pct, d_rim_rate) |>   head(15)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Conference-level rollup — great for bracket analysis conf <- torvik_conf_stats(year = 2025)  conf |>   select(conf, n_teams, mean_barthag, mean_adj_oe, mean_adj_de,          top_team, total_wab) |>   arrange(desc(mean_barthag))

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # What did teams look like at a specific point in the season? march1 <- timeMachine_ratings(date = "03-01", year = 2025)  march1 |>   arrange(desc(barthag)) |>   select(rank, team, conf, barthag, adj_oe, adj_de) |>   head(20)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Comprehensive team profile: ratings + shooting full_profile <- ratings |>   left_join(     shooting |> select(team, conf, starts_with("o_"), starts_with("d_")),     by = c("team", "conf")   ) |>   left_join(     ff |> select(team, conf, o_efg, d_efg, o_to_pct, d_to_pct,                   o_reb_pct, d_reb_pct),     by = c("team", "conf")   )  # Elite offenses that also shoot well at the rim full_profile |>   filter(adj_oe > 120, o_rim_pct > 0.60) |>   select(team, conf, adj_oe, o_rim_pct, o_rim_rate, o_efg, barthag)

code: # Get all D1 teams with ESPN IDs, conference info, and logos teams <- espn_teams()  # Find a specific team teams |> filter(grepl("Duke", display_name))  # Today's scoreboard board <- espn_scoreboard() board |> filter(status == "final") |>   select(away_team_name, away_score, home_score, home_team_name)  # Games from a specific date espn_scoreboard("2025-03-15") |>   select(game_id, away_team_name, home_team_name, away_score, home_score, status)

code: # Fetch all D1 games on a date and save to local DB (~2-3 minutes for a big day) espn_process_day(   date    = "2025-01-15",   season  = "2024-25",   sleep_sec = 0.3    # be polite to ESPN's servers )  # Or collect a single game directly (returns named list, no saving) game <- espn_game(game_id = "401703437") names(game) # "box_team_stats" "box_players" "game_info" "leaders" # "winprobability" "pickcenter" "plays" "on_off"

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Load a saved game without hitting the network game <- espn_load_game(   game_id = "401703437",   season  = "2024-25",   date    = "2024-11-11" )  # Team box score game$box_team_stats  # Player box score game$box_players |>   select(display_name, team_id, minutes_numeric, points,          true_shooting_pct, plus_minus) |>   arrange(desc(plus_minus))  # Play-by-play game$plays |>   filter(score_value > 0) |>   select(period_number, clock_display_value, text, score_home, score_away)  # Win probability game$winprobability |>   select(seq_num, home_win_percentage, play_text) |>   tail(20)  # Betting lines game$pickcenter |>   select(provider, spread, over_under, home_team_odds_moneyline)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: ’ve collected games season, use aggregation functions load everything :
code: # All team box scores for the season (combines every saved game) box <- espn_season_box("2024-25")  # Team efficiency leaders for the season box |>   group_by(team_id) |>   summarise(     games    = n(),     avg_eff  = mean(eff, na.rm = TRUE),     avg_efg  = mean(effective_field_goal_pct, na.rm = TRUE),     avg_pace = mean(pace, na.rm = TRUE),     .groups  = "drop"   ) |>   filter(games >= 10) |>   arrange(desc(avg_eff)) |>   head(20)  # All player box scores players <- espn_season_players("2024-25")  # Top players by true shooting (min 15 games, min 20 min/game) players |>   group_by(player_id, display_name, team_id) |>   summarise(     games      = n(),     avg_min    = mean(minutes_numeric, na.rm = TRUE),     avg_pts    = mean(points, na.rm = TRUE),     avg_ts     = mean(true_shooting_pct, na.rm = TRUE),     avg_pm     = mean(plus_minus, na.rm = TRUE),     .groups    = "drop"   ) |>   filter(games >= 15, avg_min >= 20) |>   arrange(desc(avg_ts))  # Quick team-level season summary (wins, losses, per-game averages) espn_team_season_summary("2024-25") |>   select(team_id, games, wins, losses, win_pct, avg_pts, avg_eff, avg_pace) |>   head(20)  # Load only conference tournament dates conf_tourney <- espn_season_box(   "2024-25",   dates = seq(as.Date("2025-03-11"), as.Date("2025-03-16"), by = "day") )

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: real power konenMCBB combining Torvik’s adjusted metrics ESPN’s raw game data.
code: # 1. Get Torvik ratings ratings <- torvik_team_ratings(year = 2025) ff      <- torvik_four_factors(year = 2025)  # 2. Get ESPN season box scores (team-level) espn_set_db_path("~/data/espn_db") box <- espn_season_box("2024-25")  # 3. ESPN team summary (empirical season stats) espn_summary <- espn_team_season_summary("2024-25")  # 4. Get team directory to join ESPN IDs with team names teams <- espn_teams()  # 5. Join ESPN summary with team names espn_named <- espn_summary |>   left_join(teams |> select(team_id, display_name, conference_name),             by = "team_id")  # 6. If you have a manual ESPN-to-Torvik name crosswalk (or fuzzy match): # For now, filter to teams with a clean name match espn_named <- espn_named |>   mutate(team_short = sub(" (Blue Devils|Tar Heels|Wildcats|.*)", "", display_name))  # 7. Efficiency gap: Torvik adjusted OE vs. empirical eFG% # Teams outperforming their shooting (good shot selection / tempo effects) combined <- ratings |>   left_join(ff |> select(team, o_efg, d_efg), by = "team")  combined |>   filter(!is.na(o_efg)) |>   mutate(oe_efg_ratio = adj_oe / (o_efg * 200)) |>   # rough efficiency-per-shot   arrange(desc(oe_efg_ratio)) |>   select(team, conf, adj_oe, o_efg, barthag, oe_efg_ratio) |>   head(20)

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
code: # Current season super schedule (all games with advanced context) sked <- get_super_sked(year = 2025, team = "Duke") sked |>   select(date, opp, result, adj_oe, adj_de, barthag_diff, quad) |>   arrange(date)  # Season resume: record by quadrant resume <- current_resume(team = "Duke", year = 2025)  # Historical team results historic_team_results(team = "Duke", year = 2025) |>   select(date, opp, result, opp_barthag) |>   filter(result == "L") |>   # loss analysis   arrange(desc(opp_barthag))

title: Getting Started with konenMCBB
text: Rate limiting — calling espn_process_day() loop across many dates, use sleep_sec = 0.3 0.5 avoid hitting ESPN’s rate limits. Column naming — konenMCBB functions return snake_case column names. Functions different sources use conventions joins predictable. Torvik year convention — year = 2025 always means 2024-25 season (year season ends). matches Torvik’s URL convention. ESPN DB path — set options(konenMCBB.espn_db_path = "~/data/espn_db") ~/.Rprofile avoid setting every session. pkgdown site — run pkgdown::build_site() package root render vignette function documentation local website.

title: Fetch and parse a single ESPN game — espn_game
text: game_id Character numeric. ESPN event (game) ID. can found ESPN game URLs: `https://www.espn.com/mens-college-basketball/game/_/gameId/401700444`. save Logical. `TRUE`, save raw JSON parsed data frames local ESPN database. Requires `season` optionally `date`. Default `FALSE`. season Character. Season label (e.g. `"2024-25"`). Required `save = TRUE`. date Date character `"YYYY-MM-DD"`. Game date. Required `save = TRUE`. base_path Character. ESPN database root path. Defaults `getOption("konenMCBB.espn_db_path")`. Set [espn_set_db_path()].

title: Fetch and parse a single ESPN game — espn_game
text: named list following tibble elements: `box_team_stats` Team-level box score advanced metrics (2 rows). `box_players` Player-level box score advanced metrics. `game_info` Venue, attendance, officials. `leaders` Stat leaders per category per team. `winprobability` Win probability play. `pickcenter` Betting lines spreads per provider. `plays` Full play--play shot coordinates. `on_off` Player rotation stints plus/minus.

title: Fetch and parse a single ESPN game — espn_game
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   game <- espn_game("401700444")    # Team box score   game$box_team_stats    # Player box score   game$box_players    # Win probability chart data   game$winprobability    # Save to local DB for later use   espn_set_db_path("~/data/espn_db")   game <- espn_game("401700444", save = TRUE, season = "2024-25", date = "2024-11-11") } # }

title: Get ESPN daily college basketball scoreboard — espn_scoreboard
text: date Date character. date fetch (e.g. `Sys.Date()`, `"2024-11-11"`, `.Date("2025-03-15")`). Defaults today. groups Character. ESPN group filter. `"50"` (default) returns D1 games . Use `"100"` games including lower divisions. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds. Default `15`.

title: Get ESPN daily college basketball scoreboard — espn_scoreboard
text: tibble one row per game, containing: game_id ESPN event ID (use [espn_game()] pull full data). date Game date Date. game_datetime Tip-time UTC character string. status Game status: `"scheduled"`, `"in_progress"`, `"final"`. period Current period (useful -progress games). clock Game clock string -progress games. home_team_id, away_team_id ESPN team IDs (join [espn_teams()]). home_team_name, away_team_name Team display names. home_score, away_score Current final scores. home_winner, away_winner Logical; `TRUE` team won. neutral_site Logical; `TRUE` neutral-site games. conference_game Logical; `TRUE` conference matchups. venue_name Arena name. broadcast TV/streaming broadcast label (e.g. `"ESPN"`, `"ESPN2"`).

title: Get ESPN daily college basketball scoreboard — espn_scoreboard
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   # Today's games   scoreboard <- espn_scoreboard()    # A specific date   espn_scoreboard("2024-03-15")    # Games still in progress right now   espn_scoreboard() |> dplyr::filter(status == "in_progress")    # Get game IDs to pass to espn_game()   ids <- espn_scoreboard("2024-11-11")$game_id   game <- espn_game(ids[1])    # Loop and fetch all games on a date   board <- espn_scoreboard("2024-11-11")   games <- lapply(board$game_id, espn_game) } # }

code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   espn_set_db_path("~/data/espn_db")    # Full season box scores   box <- espn_season_box("2024-25")    # Average offensive efficiency by team   box |>     dplyr::group_by(team_id) |>     dplyr::summarise(       games    = dplyr::n(),       avg_eff  = mean(eff, na.rm = TRUE),       avg_efg  = mean(effective_field_goal_pct, na.rm = TRUE),       avg_pace = mean(pace, na.rm = TRUE)     ) |>     dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(avg_eff))    # Load only games from a specific date range   dates <- seq(as.Date("2025-01-01"), as.Date("2025-03-01"), by = "day")   box_conf <- espn_season_box("2024-25", dates = dates) } # }

what: konenMCBB: College Basketball Data Digestion for R — konenMCBB

text: `konenMCBB` provides unified interface pulling, parsing, storing college basketball data multiple sources: - **Bart Torvik** (`barttorvik.com`) — advanced team player efficiency   metrics, four factors, T-Rank power ratings, schedules,   Time Machine historical ratings archive. - **ESPN** — live historical game data including box scores,   play--play, win probability, betting lines, /rotations,   saved structured local database. - **Sports Reference** (`sports-reference.com`) — player game logs, rosters,   historical team directory. - **NCAA** — play--play box scores direct NCAA.com. - **Covers.com** — current injury reports.

title: Get team box score game log (Bart Torvik) — teamBoxScore

title: Get team box score game log (Bart Torvik) — teamBoxScore
text: team Character. Team name used barttorvik.com (e.g. `"Duke"`, `"North Carolina"`). Use `""` (default) return teams. season Numeric. Season year (e.g. `2026` 2025-26). Default `2026`. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds. Default `15`.

title: Get team box score game log (Bart Torvik) — teamBoxScore
text: data.frame one row per game, containing: date Game date. AwayTeam, HomeTeam Team names. Away Fg made, Away Fg Att Away field goal totals. Away 3pt Fg Made, Away 3pt Fg Att Away three-point totals. Away FT made, Away FT att Away free throw totals. Away Orb, Away Drb, Away Rbs Away rebound totals. Away Asts, Away Steals, Away Blocks, Away Turnovers, Away Fouls Away counting stats. Away Score, Home Score Final scores. Home Fg made, ... set stats home team. Pace Estimated possessions game.

title: Get team box score game log (Bart Torvik) — teamBoxScore
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   # Duke's full 2025-26 game log   duke <- teamBoxScore(team = "Duke", season = 2026)    # All games, current season   all_games <- teamBoxScore() } # }

what: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
title: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
text: Aggregates Bart Torvik team ratings four factors conference level, giving bird's-eye view conference stacks efficiency, power rating, pace, shooting.

title: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
code: torvik_conf_stats(   year = as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y")),   min_teams = 4L,   timeout = 20 )

title: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
text: year Integer. Season year (e.g. `2026` 2025-26). Must `>= 2008`. Defaults current year. min_teams Integer. Minimum number teams conference must included (filters tiny non-standard groupings). Default `4`. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds passed underlying data functions. Default `20`.

title: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
text: function pulls [torvik_team_ratings()] [torvik_four_factors()] internally joins team name. Torvik's naming slightly inconsistent endpoints small number teams, teams may excluded four-factor columns — raw counts still correct.

title: Get conference-level aggregate stats (Bart Torvik) — torvik_conf_stats
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   conf <- torvik_conf_stats()    # Best offensive conferences   conf |> dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mean_adj_oe))    # Conference defensive rankings   conf |>     dplyr::arrange(mean_adj_de) |>     dplyr::select(conf, n_teams, mean_adj_de, mean_d_efg, mean_d_reb_pct)    # Overall conference strength   conf |>     dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(mean_barthag)) |>     dplyr::select(conf, n_teams, mean_barthag, top_team, total_wab) } # }

what: Get Bart Torvik team four factors — torvik_four_factors
title: Get Bart Torvik team four factors — torvik_four_factors
text: Retrieves four-factors efficiency table Bart Torvik given season. four factors (eFG efficiency metrics offense defense, popularized Dean Oliver.

title: Get Bart Torvik team four factors — torvik_four_factors
code: torvik_four_factors(   year = as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y")),   conf = "All",   timeout = 20 )

title: Get Bart Torvik team four factors — torvik_four_factors
text: year Integer. Season year (e.g. `2026` 2025-26 season). Must `>= 2008`. Defaults current year. conf Character. Optional conference filter (e.g. `"ACC"`, `"B10"`). Use `""` (default) teams. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds. Default `20`.

title: Get Bart Torvik team four factors — torvik_four_factors
text: tibble one row per team, containing: team Team name. conf Conference abbreviation. gp Games played. adj_oe Adjusted offensive efficiency. adj_de Adjusted defensive efficiency. barthag Power rating. o_efg Offensive effective field goal percentage. o_to_pct Offensive turnover percentage (lower better). o_reb_pct Offensive rebound percentage. o_ftr Offensive free throw rate (FTA / FGA). d_efg Defensive effective field goal percentage allowed. d_to_pct Defensive turnover percentage forced (higher better). d_reb_pct Defensive rebound percentage. d_ftr Defensive free throw rate allowed. adj_tempo Adjusted pace (possessions per 40 minutes). wab Wins bubble.

what: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
text: Retrieves shot location efficiency data every team Bart Torvik — often teams shoot rim, mid-range, three-point line, efficiently convert zone, offense defense.

title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
code: torvik_shooting(   year = as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y")),   conf = "All",   timeout = 20 )

title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
text: year Integer. Season year (e.g. `2026` 2025-26). Must `>= 2008`. Defaults current year. conf Character. Optional conference filter (e.g. `"ACC"`, `"B10"`). Use `""` (default) teams. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds. Default `20`.

title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
text: tibble one row per team, containing: team Team name (Torvik convention). conf Conference abbreviation. gp Games played. o_rim_made, o_rim_att Rim shot makes attempts (offense). o_rim_pct Offensive rim shooting percentage. o_rim_rate Percentage field goal attempts taken rim. o_mid_made, o_mid_att Mid-range makes attempts (offense). o_mid_pct Offensive mid-range shooting percentage. o_mid_rate Percentage field goal attempts mid-range. o_three_made, o_three_att Three-point makes attempts (offense). o_three_pct Offensive three-point percentage. o_three_rate Percentage field goal attempts three. o_dunk_made, o_dunk_att Dunk makes attempts (offense). o_dunk_pct Offensive dunk percentage. d_rim_made, d_rim_att Rim shot makes attempts allowed. d_rim_pct Defensive rim shooting percentage allowed. d_rim_rate Percentage opponent FGA rim. d_mid_made, d_mid_att Mid-range makes attempts allowed. d_mid_pct Defensive mid-range percentage allowed. d_mid_rate Percentage opponent FGA mid-range. d_three_made, d_three_att Three-point makes attempts allowed. d_three_pct Defensive three-point percentage allowed. d_three_rate Percentage opponent FGA three. d_dunk_made, d_dunk_att Dunk makes attempts allowed. d_dunk_pct Defensive dunk percentage allowed.

title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
text: Shot location data one actionable layers college basketball analytics. Understanding ** team gets shots (forces opponents shoot) goes beyond four factors. team high `o_rim_rate` high `o_rim_pct` generating high-quality offense near basket; team low `d_three_rate` successfully pushing opponents away arc. "Rim" shots typically defined within 4 feet basket. "Mid-range" covers everything rim zone three-point line.

title: Get Bart Torvik team shooting splits — torvik_shooting
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   # All teams, current season   shooting <- torvik_shooting()    # Best rim-finishing teams   shooting |>     dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(o_rim_pct)) |>     dplyr::select(team, conf, o_rim_pct, o_rim_rate, o_three_rate)    # Best rim-protecting defenses   shooting |>     dplyr::arrange(d_rim_pct) |>     dplyr::select(team, conf, d_rim_pct, d_rim_rate)    # Teams that live at the rim (high rim rate) and shoot few mid-rangers   shooting |>     dplyr::filter(o_rim_rate > 0.40, o_mid_rate < 0.20) |>     dplyr::select(team, conf, o_rim_rate, o_mid_rate, o_three_rate, o_rim_pct)    # SEC teams   torvik_shooting(conf = "SEC") } # }

what: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
text: Retrieves current Bart Torvik T-Rank team ratings table given season. primary team-quality metric table barttorvik.com, containing adjusted offensive defensive efficiency, Barthag power rating, adjusted tempo, WAB, rankings.

title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
code: torvik_team_ratings(   year = as.integer(format(Sys.Date(), "%Y")),   conf = "All",   timeout = 20 )

title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
text: year Integer. Season year (e.g. `2026` 2025-26 season). Must `>= 2008`. Defaults current year. conf Character. Optional conference filter (e.g. `"ACC"`, `"B10"`). Use `""` (default) teams. See barttorvik.com abbreviations. timeout Numeric. Request timeout seconds. Default `20`.

title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
text: tibble one row per team, containing: rank Overall T-Rank ranking. team Team name (matches Torvik's naming convention). conf Conference abbreviation. record Season record (W-L). adj_oe Adjusted offensive efficiency (points per 100 possessions vs. avg D). oe_rank Adjusted OE rank. adj_de Adjusted defensive efficiency (points allowed per 100 possessions vs. avg O). de_rank Adjusted DE rank. barthag Power rating — estimated win probability vs. average D1 team (0–1). adj_tempo Adjusted pace (possessions per 40 minutes). proj_w, proj_l Projected wins losses. wab Wins bubble. wab_rank WAB rank. sos Strength schedule. fun Torvik "fun rating" — exciting team plays.

title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
text: Ratings opponent-adjusted using Torvik's iterative methodology. team `adj_oe = 120` scores 120 points per 100 possessions average D1 defense. `barthag` cleanest single-number summary: value 0.95 means team expected beat average team 95 Column names cleaned snake_case. raw Torvik column headers preserved `raw_name` attribute needed.

title: Get Bart Torvik team ratings (T-Rank) — torvik_team_ratings
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{   # Current season all teams   ratings <- torvik_team_ratings()   head(ratings)    # Filter to ACC only   acc <- torvik_team_ratings(conf = "ACC")    # Historical season   ratings_2024 <- torvik_team_ratings(year = 2024) } # }
